items.summary: In frontend/src/components/Education.tsx, review and polish the existing Education Timeline entries. Ensure all four milestones are clearly labelled and well-presented: (1) Nimatpur Girls High School – BSE (10th), (2) CHSE – +2 (12th), (3) +3 Degree (Bachelor's), (4) PGDCA / Multimedia training at Mayuri Multimedia. For each entry, display the institution name prominently, the qualification/level as a subtitle, and include a short descriptive label (e.g. 'Secondary Education', 'Higher Secondary', 'Graduation', 'Diploma in Computer Applications & Multimedia'). Ensure the vertical alternating timeline layout, sky-blue milestone markers, and scroll-triggered animations are intact and visually consistent with the rest of the site.
